task_label: Interneuron synapse and arbor rescue task
summary: Active governed rescue task that freezes historical interneuron synapse and arbor candidate datasets alongside held-out post-cutoff follow-up labels.

artifact_contracts.description: Frozen pre-cutoff interneuron synapse candidates with explicit source provenance.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: Must be assembled only from pre-cutoff literature snapshots and must exclude post-cutoff follow-up adjudications.

artifact_contracts.description: Frozen pre-cutoff interneuron arbor candidates with explicit source provenance.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: Must be assembled only from pre-cutoff literature snapshots and must exclude post-cutoff follow-up adjudications.

artifact_contracts.description: Manual post-cutoff follow-up labels used only for offline rescue evaluation.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: May summarize post-cutoff follow-up support but must never be exposed to candidate selection, ranking, or thresholding.

artifact_contracts.description: Future ranked rescue outputs emitted by downstream rescue implementations.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: Must depend only on frozen ranking-input datasets and must not embed hidden evaluation labels.

artifact_contracts.description: Optional operator metadata that documents why the synapse and arbor axes were frozen together.
artifact_contracts.leakage_rule: May document intended scope and cutoff but must not summarize post-cutoff evaluation outcomes.

leakage_boundary.notes: The active interneuron family preserves the strict rescue-only leakage boundary introduced in PR-40 and PR-40A.

notes: PR-40C materializes two pre-cutoff ranking-input datasets and one held-out post-cutoff evaluation dataset for downstream rescue consumers.
